programme.title: Welcome

programme.desc: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'Pretty Please' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts, who are making their comeback in October, will present a collaboration with Pokémon through their new album track 'Pretty Please.' The lyrics express that same thrill and value found in those moments.'Pretty Please' is a new jack swing-style dance song that captures the excitement and preciousness of moments when simply being together on a shared journey becomes each other's joy.

programme.title: SUHO 'Who Are You' MV
programme.desc: EXO's Suho has released his fourth mini-album Who Are You. The title track, Who Are You, is an alternative rock song that combines raw-toned electric guitar and bass with a catchy melody. The lyrics capture the moment of parting, calmly facing the flow of farewell that can be felt even without clear words. The song is available in both Korean and English versions.

programme.title: SUHO 'Medicine' MV
programme.desc: Its witty lyrics capture attention with the message that the only cure for the fever of love is you.'Medicine' is a retro-inspired indie pop track featuring a disco backbeat and rhythmic riffs.

programme.title: Red Velvet Music Video Compilation

programme.desc: 5. Just Friends 7. Still 8. Sonnet With this album, Doyoung hopes to deliver a steady yet profound resonance to those who dream of taking flight in their own lives, giving them the courage to take a new step forward. Having gained the “power to dream” himself through music, he now wishes to pass on that strength to others through his own songs. 10. Eternity6. Luminous 3. Be My Light 9. Sand Box 1. Wake From The Dark 2. Memory 4. First Step NCT's Doyoung has released his second solo album 「Soar」, an album that speaks about the “power to dream.” Through ten tracks, including the title song *Memory*, he sings of a journey to rise toward the endless sky and find his own path. [Track List]

programme.title: HAECHAN The 1st Album 'TASTE'
programme.desc: 4. Love Beyond 11. Outro (Back In The Studio)6. Intermission 1. Camera Lights The title 「TASTE」 carries a dual meaning: sharing the musical “tastes” Haechan has cultivated from his childhood dream of becoming a singer to the present, and inviting listeners to “taste” the very first music he has created as a solo artist. Through this album, fans can fully experience Haechan's world of music. 10. Grey Rain 3. ADRENALINE 9. Should Be NCT Haechan has released his first solo album 「TASTE」, featuring 11 tracks including the title song *CRZY*. The album highlights Haechan's unique musical color, built around his favorite genre, R&B, and expands into diverse moods of soul, hip-hop, and jazz. 5. Roll With Me 7. Talented 8. WYN? (Feat. programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: There's been a migration of financial powerbrokers to South Florida in recent years, drawn by various factors. It's hard to imagine the capital of finance leaving New York, but Wall Street South is getting bigger every day.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Wall Street pros often play poker, chess, blackjack and other games that rely on skills that are highly transferable to their work the lines between finance and gaming are blurring faster than ever.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Building wealth used to follow a formula, but these days it's easier than ever to play the markets. With investing tools at everyone's fingertips, is it a chance for generational wealth or a siren call for suckers?

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Finance is an industry dominated by men, but women are rising and controlling more wealth globally how did the women of Wall Street break through, and what's changing now that they have?

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb,

programme.title: Ten Me Ep 01
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome Epi 06
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 10
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Miranda takes a drive through the forest and hears a humming noise coming from a rock on the side of the mountain, which suddenly pulls her towards it

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Robinhood EP 06
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Kissa Currency Ka
programme.desc: The introduction of currency was a key step in the evolution of civilization. As the kingdoms and dynasties across the country rose and fell, they left their mark on the currency they produced. This series explores the coins minted by each kingdom in Indian history, and uses stories about the coins to tell the history of the kingdom itself.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian

programme.desc: Anchorage is home to over 2000 moose and these notorious animals are running riot! With 300,000 people living alongside wild animals, the sizzling summer heat, sometimes brings conflict between humans and wildlife.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: Being one of Africa's Big 5, the Buffalo is an animal that requires a well-experienced team to capture and load. Bushbuck on the other hand proves to be much easier to capture...

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: In this episode of Modern Migrations we've reached the end of the capture season. However, before we reflect on the seasons' high's and low's it is history in the making when we will attempt to relocate a black rhino cow AND her calf simultaneously!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Hundreds of Black Bears live in Anchorage and have found a food source that is much easier to catch than slippery salmon - it's trash. Any it's everywhere. With their brains, brawn and cunning these bears have mastered life in the urban jungle.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to an animal renowned as nature's lumberjack and North Americas largest rodent, the beaver. Since humans arrived in Anchorage, many beavers have been forced to live in an urban jungle!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to a huge number of porcupines, living in the city's streets, gardens and parks. But life on the streets also takes its toll. Porcupines are the city's number one roadkill.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Rejected by his mother, Tswalu has been through a lot. It's suspected he's broken his leg, but he's not well enough to travel to the veterinary hospital. He's one of only 800 desert black rhinos left in the world and they'll do anything to save him.

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.desc: Get your 'Gobble Gobble' on with this special episode of Holiday Eatz, featuring fun and charming host Kimberly Lallouz! She starts her terrific Turkey Day menu with a harvest happy Kale Salad heaped with beets, candied pecans, toasted lentils, and goat cheese. Thanksgiving dinner needs Hot Rolls, Chef Lallouz packs hers with cranberries and corn, then serves them as a standalone course with a cheesy, creamy Mushroom Fondue! Next, it's time to talk turkey with a trick that cuts your poultry cooking time in half! Her Spatchcock Turkey is not just faster than old school, it's yummier too, with a garlic-herb marinade and a unique side of mixed beans and rice! Candied sweet potatoes and marshmallows make their perennial appearance here, but Chef Kimberly has a version that will fry"... your brain! Check out her Sweet Potato Churros with Marshmallow Creme for a presentation you"... do-nut"... want to miss!

programme.title: Spencer's Holiday BBQ
programme.desc: Join charismatic chef Spencer Watts at his glorious rooftop patio for a one-hour special featuring a full holiday spread, all made on the BBQ. Spencer's festive menu is all about creative BBQ twists with his delectable, mouth-watering recipes including Burnt Orange Cranberry Marmalade, Maple Rye Pumpkin Pie, and Asparagus with Smoked Salmon Dip. Save room for the piece de Q-sistance: Smoked Turkey Two Ways. This year, take your holiday feast outside and serve up something deliciously different.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Kelly Harvey-Mycula is shocked by the results of her DNA test and learns more about her ancestry with the help of host Tyrone Edwards.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Whether for a small family dinner or a big backyard barbeque, host Spencer Watts shows us the best ways to grill up tasty duck, turkey, capon, and quail.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on wine sauces! First up, a classic veal marsala! Next, a white wine chicken gravy and a port sabayon with grapes!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.desc: Vanessa plans an autumn-themed menu with a table to match! There's blood orange and broccolini salad, butternut squash mac ‘n' cheese, cranberry-rosemary chicken thighs, sheet pan curried cauliflower, and so much more!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: In this bacon loving episode, Chef Spencer delivers a tasty Bacon Weave Turkey Breast, which gets injected with beer and spices before being wrapped up in its cozy bacon blanket and sent off to the grill! Next up? A Peameal Bacon Roast with Rosti. This heavy hunk of back bacon gets smoked to flavourful perfection while Chef Watts makes the crispiest golden-fried-to-perfection potato pancake. Then, Spencer whips up a charry, grilled, super decadent, bacon-wrapped and bacon stuffed cheeseburger. Spencer isn't finished with bacon yet! For his final recipe, Spencer stuffs an apple with decadent crispy morsels stuffed along with savoury caramelized onions and melty cheddar cheese.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts makes Zucchini Noodles with Jumbo Turkey Meatballs for a healthy take on spaghetti night in around 30 minutes.

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a springtime menu with a table to match! There's fava beans and asparagus salad, lamb shoulder with artichokes and mint, sumac-lime green beans, deviled eggs, and so much more!

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: Fall favourites are on display as chef Pino Di Cerbo shares magic autumn dishes. Beginning with Brussels sprouts, Pino serves them both roasted and fresh over creamy labneh with a funky black garlic dressing. Then, for a twist on regular risotto, Pino combines barley and celery to create a dish that is creamy and comforting. Autumn keeps falling in the next dish, a salad of butternuts, kale and a vibrant vinaigrette bursting with apple and ginger. For his fall finale, Pino creates mushrooms on toast with roasted mixed mushrooms in a rich sauce paired with gremolata and served hot on toasted focaccia!

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode Duncan travels to Udon Thani at the great Lotus Lake, where he pulls fresh lotus flowers from the water to make yum dok mai and then travels to the city centre to eat one of Thailand's delicacies.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Homeowners Helen and Niall are getting nervous - they're a few short months away from the birth of their first child and their never-renovated 1920s home doesn't contain a nursery. Both work full time - so they're relying on designer Samantha Pynn to create a bright and practical room for their new bundle of joy. Sam converts their underutilized spare bedroom into a hip, eco-friendly nursery using bright colours, contemporary baby furniture, colourful accessories and natural materials.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Claudia and Justin are professional foodies - he's a chef and she's a food stylist. So it's no surprise that their urban loft space has a beautifully designed modern kitchen. Only problem is, the rest of the space doesn't measure up: it's a mishmash of Danish modern with other inherited and found pieces.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity after winning a bet amongst them & the amount is determined by how long Mike lasts in the ring boxing against a professional. This client is looking for an investment property & a place for him to live when visiting.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle. Daryl's client has older children with their own families now so they are looking for a home with lots of land & nature. It is very important to them because they want to be able to have everyone comfortably visit & eventually retire here in a few years.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Funky chef, Melvyn Lee, begins his culinary journey in Pampanga, Philippines. Known as the culinary centre of the Philippines, Pampanga is the place to go for foodies. Here, Melvyn visits two very different families- a celebrity artist, and a tribal chief, and experiences the Filipino life and cuisine in a whole new light.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: Aspasia Karras, Editor at Large of the Sunday Times, invites us into her home, sharing all things that make of her life and lifestyle.

programme.title: World's Greatest Cruises
programme.desc: Sailing on the Rhone River through the South of France Avignon's market making olive oil a dog who hunts for truffles wine.

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we cover the Eurostar, the Volvo Ocean Race in New Zealand, Geneva Motorshow, Niki de Saint Phalel and concept cars.

programme.title: Finest Homes
programme.desc: Takes us all the way to the suburb of Scarborough, on the edge of the Cape Point Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: Angelique and Tina meet in the romantic studio kitchen to win the heart of vineyard worker David. Who will leave as the best of friends?

programme.desc: In Dublin's East Wall, Róisín, Peter and the crew are about to attempt their biggest home rescue to date.

programme.title: Get Out of Town
programme.desc: Orlando can be a gateway to all sorts of surprising adventures.

programme.title: Get Out of Town
programme.desc: Relive the golden age of Hollywood.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the rivers, lakes and caves around Lake Guntersville, Alabama by kayak.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Ken Whiting travels to Juneau, Alaska to paddle with whales, bears, glaciers and icebergs on a multi-day sea kayaking adventure.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: A romantic trip to Colorado takes a windy turn when Jason pushes Tayler, despite her hesitation, to summit Mt. Democrat in 70 mph winds and -19 degree weather.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
